text: Artificial Intelligence, or AI, refers to the ability of machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers use data to improve their performance without being explicitly programmed. Deep learning is a more advanced type of machine learning, inspired by the human brain, enabling systems to recognize patterns like speech or images. AI is already part of our daily lives. It powers virtual assistants, recommends movies on streaming services, helps navigate traffic, and even assists doctors in diagnosing diseases. As AI continues to evolve, it promises to transform many more aspects of how we live and work.
